channel.title: Homes on JooYoung Seo: a Learning Scientist for Inclusive Learning Ecologies
channel.description: Recent content in Homes on JooYoung Seo: a Learning Scientist for Inclusive Learning Ecologies

item.title: Academic
item.description: The highly flexible website framework for Hugo with an extensible plugin mechanism. Create a beautifully simple site in under 10 minutes 🚀 Latest release (function defer() { if (window.jQuery) { jQuery(document).ready(function(){ GetLatestReleaseInfo(); }); } else { setTimeout(function() { defer() }, 50); } })(); function GetLatestReleaseInfo() { $.getJSON('https://api.github.com/repos/gcushen/hugo-academic/tags').done(function (json) { let release = json[0]; // let downloadURL = release.zipball_url; $('#academic-release').text('Latest release ' + release.name); }); }

Biography JooYoung Seo is a Ph.D. Candidate in the Learning, Design, and Technology program at the Penn State University, and an internationally certified accessibility professional (CPACC) by the International Association of Accessibility Professionals. He also works as an instructional developer (graduate assistant) at the TLT (Teaching and Learning with Technology) IT Accessibility Team at Penn State. As an accessibility/assistive? technology expert, he has been training HTML5 and ARIA (the Accessible Rich Internet Applications) for other colleagues at the TLT studio since March 2015.

item.title: Teaching
item.description: This is an example of using the custom widget to create your own homepage section. I am a teaching instructor for the following courses at University X: CS101: An intro to computer science CS102: An intro to computer science CS103: An intro to computer science CS104: An intro to computer science CS105: An intro to computer science CS106: An intro to computer science CS107: An intro to computer science
